chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 768 - وَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ يَكْرَهُ اَلسَّوَادَ إِلاَّ فِي ثَلاَثَةٍ اَلْعِمَامَةِ وَ اَلْخُفِّ وَ اَلْكِسَاءِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.768 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) disliked wearing black except in three cases: the turban, the shoes, and the cloak.
